title: raw_77_nanobot_actuation_v2 — actuator output schema
description: N-R1 actuator mechanical-spec contract (extends raw_77_nanobot_actuation_v1 from cycle 24 with vertex_decorations + pose_canonical_form + state_cycle + binding_affinity). Lands draft from .roadmap.nanobot §STALLED N-R1 (line 87).

vertex_decorations.description: 12 truncated-icosahedron vertices with their decoration. Required for J2=24 canonicalization to be meaningful (unlabelled vertices give trivial pose group).

ligand.description: Binding ligand label, or null for bare vertex.

charge_e.description: Net charge in units of elementary charge.

mass_amu.description: Decoration mass in atomic mass units.

pose_canonical_form.description: Canonical pose representative under O_h subgroup (|O|=24). Replaces bare pose_canonicalize_speedup_factor=24.0 emit.

representative_pose.description: Lex-min coset representative under O_h subgroup.

orbit_size.description: Must equal 24 for canonical actuator (J2 = orbit size).

state_cycle.description: 4-state motor cycle (S0, S1, S2, S3) with transition rate matrix.

transition_matrix_per_s.description: 4x4 rate constants k_ij in units of s^-1 (row i = from-state, col j = to-state).

binding_affinity.description: Binding affinity entry per ligand-decorated vertex.

target.description: Target receptor / antigen label (e.g. CD33, FLT3, ACE2, p16).

work_per_cycle_kT.description: Work per productive S0 -> S1 -> S3 -> S0 cycle in units of kT at 310K. F-NB-3-floor PASS gate >=10.

skeleton.description: Mechanical skeleton variant. truncated_icosahedron = C0b PASS (cycle 24); cuboctahedron = GATE-26-1 stretch.
